HOMECARE with Integrity The answer to continual INDEPENDENCE and SUPPORT for Seniors!!

Learn More

Welcome toDominion Home Care Services LLC

Dominion Home Care is the answer to continual independence for seniors. Whether the services are for you or a loved one, we offer companionship and assistance with daily activities and routines to extend and enhance living at home in a stress-free environment.

Let’s start you or your loved one’s journey to a better life at home. You can trust our professional caregivers to provide you with exemplary care to help you achieve independence and a better quality of life.

What We Can Offer Our Services

We strive to continue to provide home care services for you to help you lead comfortably and independently as possible.

[ View More Services ]

Companionship

We help to keep you stay healthy and happy in the comfort of your home.

Click Here »

Respite Care

Take some time off to regain your strength.

Click Here »

Personal Care

We help with the activities of daily living, such as dressing and bathing.

Click Here »

Homemaking

With our cleaning services, we assist your loved ones with light housekeeping and cleaning duties.

Click Here »
IN-HOME ASSESSMENT

Schedule your assessment with us today to help us understand your needs.

Click Here »

Who We Are

Mission Statement

Dominion Home Care Services LLC is the answer to continuaINDEPENDENCE and SUPPORT for Seniors! We provide customized home care plans that will address their individual needs and provide stress-free caregiving in the comfort and security of their homes.

About Us

You Can Count on Us

Dominion Home Care is a Home Care Provider You Can Trust!

  • We provide individualized family-focused care to seniors in their homes.
  • We improve the quality of life for seniors with compassion and care.
  • We provide one-on-one attention and care that cannot be compared in other settings.
  • We provide HomeCare with Integrity.

Reach Out to Us

Send Us a Message

Testimonials

" I highly recommend Dominion Home Care Services- because I highly value the character and the integrity of its owner. As a retired Executive Director and former colleague of deAnna, I know personally, that her commitment to quality is number one. Therefore, I am confident in the company's ethical, loving and caring approach to providing top notch services for your loved one. "

~Al Smith~

Service Areas Covered: Philadelphia and Montgomery Counties of Pennsylvania

Service Areas Covered: Tulsa County and Oklahoma City, Oklahoma
